items.title: Forget the 2.8% Social Security Increase. These Aristocrats Pay You 4% to 7% More Annually
items.description: The Social Security Administration announced in October that beneficiaries will receive a 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) in 2026, following a 2.5% increase in 2025. While these adjustments help protect purchasing power for 71 million Americans, dividend growth stocks have historically delivered substantially higher annual increases.
